posts.author: Y.H (Y.H)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello

Does anybody track vacations/time off in Monday? Currently we use excel for visualizing different weeks and I’d like to convert this into Monday instead if possible. My problem when trying to re-create this in Monday is that the Timeline Column limitates you to only choose one series of weeks, and you’re not able to spread it out in between different weeks. I.e I want to be off for 2 weeks in June, work in July, and then be off 2 weeks in August.

Any help in this would be super appreciated!
